title: maharanga alba
side_effects: Maharanga alba can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged use of the plant has also been linked to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high levels of toxic compounds. In rare cases, improper use of Maharanga alba can lead to cardiovascular problems, such as rapid heartbeat and hypertension, as well as increased risk of bleeding and bruising. Additionally, excessive consumption of the plant has been known to cause kidney damage and liver failure in severe instances.
